scripts.title: Intro
scripts.content:
INTRO

Hey Dr. [NAME]?

Hey Dr. [NAME], this is Rose, and I’m reaching out because we manage the Healthcare Research Division for Facebook and we’re currently selecting top practices in the Phoenix area for our network. We’re considering the [Practice Name] to be part of it.

So, I need to schedule or coordinate a good time that works for you for a 45-minute interview just in front of a computer. My director can interview you about the practice and see if you would be a good fit.

You’re the sole owner of the practice, [Practice Name], right?

Looking at his calendar, I see he has an opening at [time] or [time] on [day]. Which time works best for you?

So for tomorrow, are you available in the morning or afternoon?

Confirmation Steps

So just to confirm, you’re the sole owner of the practice, [Practice Name], right?

Okay, and we’re going to send you a confirmation of the meeting via text. Is this the best number to send that to?

Okay great, and after the interview, if you’re selected, we’re going to send you a confirmation email. What’s the best email to send that to?

Okay great, and just so that we can share exactly what the initiative looks like, you’ll have access to a computer when we call, right?

Awesome… and I’m putting you in my director’s calendar now. Can you do me a favor and put that in your calendar as well?

Okay great, so I have you in my director’s calendar for [Day] [Time] [Time Zone]. Just be sure you’re by a computer. We’ll go through some questions, interview you about the practice, and see if you’ll be a good fit!

scripts.title: Confirmation Steps
scripts.content:
Confirmation Steps

So just to confirm you’re the sole owner of the practice [Practice Name], right?

Okay, and we’re going to send you a confirmation of the meeting via text. Is this the best number to send that to?

Okay great, and after the interview, if you’re selected, we’re going to send you a confirmation email. What’s the best email to send that to?

Okay great, and just so that we can share exactly what the initiative looks like, you’ll have access to a computer when we call, right?

Awesome… and I’m putting you in my director’s calendar now. Can you do me a favor and put that in your calendar as well?

Okay great, so I have you in my director’s calendar for [Day] [Time] [Time Zone]. Just be sure you’re by a computer. We’ll go through some questions, interview you about the practice, and see if you’ll be a good fit!

scripts.title: I’m Not Interested
scripts.content:
I’m not interested

Oh… so there’s nothing to be interested in… are you familiar with the social media referral network?

Now, are you familiar at all with the social media referral network?

Okay, so currently, the only way to be found on social media is through paid ads, which are almost always funded by corporate practices.

And unfortunately, many of these corporate practices provide subpar medical experiences to their patients.

So what we’re doing is, we’re building a referral network within social media platforms that allows patients to discover quality private practices near them based on merit, rather than just those investing in paid content.

And that way, when patients search for a practice locally, it’s someone that they’re able to find based on a certain competence, a certain adequacy, and a certain distinction.

But does that clarify a little bit more about the significance of the call and what’s going on?

Great, so the interview is going to be about 45 minutes; it’s over the phone. What I wanted to do is coordinate a good time that works for you and my Director for sometime this week.

And for tomorrow, are you better in the mornings or afternoons?

What’s the social media referral network?

It’s a referral network nationwide that utilizes social media platforms like Facebook and Instagram to allow patients to find the best in health and wellness. To do that, we need to make sure we’re only sending patients to the right practices. Does that make sense?

scripts.title: Social Media Referral Network
scripts.content:
What’s the social media referral network?

It’s a referral network nationwide that utilizes social media platforms like Facebook and Instagram to allow patients to find the best in health and wellness. To do that, we need to make sure we’re only sending patients to the right practices. Does that make sense?

scripts.title: I’m Not Interested (Second Time)
scripts.content:
No, that still does not make sense / I’m not interested (for the second or third time)

Got it. So, let me clarify because I’m sensing the caliber of the call isn’t fully being understood.

Right now, if you’ve noticed when you search online, the only medical offices that come up when a patient searches locally are corporate-run practices, not privately held practices such as yours, right?

The problem is that those corporate-run practices are usually a factory and leave patients with a sour taste in their mouth. But, ironically, these same patients actually never end up at private practice with a much better experience because the search engines and social media brands have essentially sold themselves off to whoever is willing to pay.

So now, because there have been so many complaints about this issue from both doctors and patients, the social media referral network was created so that only the top practices that actually do qualitative work will be seen when patients are searching. Does that clarify a little bit more about the significance of the call?

scripts.title: Is This a Paid Thing?
scripts.content:
Is this a paid thing? How much does this cost?

Oh, so this isn’t a marketing or paid advertising thing, it’s just an interview so that we can refer patients to the right practices. Now to just confirm, you’re the sole owner of the practice right?

scripts.title: Send Me an Email
scripts.content:
Send me an email:

Oh, this isn’t like an advertising thing, so I don’t actually have a proposal or anything to send. It’s an interview and my style of interview is very organic, so I don’t send pre-formulated questions or anything like that. The interview will be more of an organic conversation exactly how you and I are talking right now. So, all I need to do is set up a time with you when you have 40-50 minutes and could be in front of the computer, so I could learn a bit more about you guys and see if you would be a good fit. So, for tomorrow, are you available in the morning or afternoon? You know what I mean?

scripts.title: I’m Not Doing Anything Until You Send Something
scripts.content:
I’m not doing anything until you send something.

That’s fair. I can send a short summary right away so you have something concrete to review and evaluate.

scripts.title: Office Manager
scripts.content:
Office Manager

Totally understand. If the office manager is the right point of contact, I’m happy to speak with them directly and keep it brief.

scripts.title: How Does It Work
scripts.content:
How does it work?

The process is pretty straightforward. We identify opportunities, make a light introduction, and then let the team decide if it’s a fit.

scripts.title: Why Are You Doing This
scripts.content:
Why are you doing this?

We’re reaching out because we help practices streamline outreach and create better conversations with patients and referral partners.

scripts.title: How Did You Select Me
scripts.content:
How did you select me?

We generally look for practices that are growing, have a strong patient base, and are open to exploring smarter ways to stay in front of new opportunities.

scripts.title: 5 Point Metric System
scripts.content:
5 Point Metric System

We use a simple five-point metric system to measure fit and relevance so we only bring forward opportunities that make sense.

scripts.title: Cell Phone Number
scripts.content:
Cell Phone Number

I understand. I can send the information to your office number or direct it to the contact method you prefer.

scripts.title: I Already Have Facebook
scripts.content:
I already have Facebook.

That’s great. We’re not trying to replace your current channels. We’re simply adding another layer of visibility and referral support.

scripts.title: Call Me in Two Weeks
scripts.content:
Call me in two weeks.

That’s fair. I can circle back in two weeks and keep the conversation light. If it’s useful, I’ll check in then.

scripts.title: Healthcare Research Division
scripts.content:
Healthcare Research Division

Understood. We work with practices and healthcare teams that want more efficient outreach and stronger visibility in the market.

scripts.title: Driving During Interview
scripts.content:
Driving during interview.

I understand. I can keep this brief and send the information over so you can review it when it’s convenient.

scripts.title: Are You Facebook or Third Party
scripts.content:
Are you Facebook or third party?

We’re not a social media platform and we’re not a third-party lead vendor. We’re a service that helps practices improve outreach and conversion opportunities.

scripts.title: Other Practices
scripts.content:
Other practices.

We work with many practices, but we always tailor the conversation based on your current goals and the opportunities you’re trying to unlock.

scripts.title: How Do You Make Money
scripts.content:
How do you make money?

We make money through a simple service model that aligns with the outcomes we help deliver. We’re focused on value and results, not pressure.

scripts.title: Call Me Back
scripts.content:
Call me back.

Absolutely. I’ll note your preference and follow up at the time you requested so it’s convenient for you.

scripts.title: Purpose of the Call
scripts.content:
Purpose of the call.

The purpose of my call is simple: to introduce a service that helps practices improve visibility and reach prospects in a more effective way.

scripts.title: We Don’t Accept New Patients
scripts.content:
We don’t accept new patients.

Understood. In that case, this may not be the right fit. I appreciate your time and will leave you with the information we have available.

scripts.title: How Patients Find Practices
scripts.content:
How patients find practices.

We help practices improve the way patients discover them and how they stay visible in a crowded market.

scripts.title: Holiday Script
scripts.content:
Holiday Script

Hi Dr. [NAME], I wanted to reach out during the holiday season to introduce a simple idea that may be useful for your practice in the new year.

scripts.title: Website
scripts.content:
Website

Absolutely, I can send you the website link directly so you can review it when you have a moment.
